config.block_description: Controlled 2-agent ID vs US baseline block. Use this before exploratory variants.
config.cell_description: Natural cross-lingual cell: ID persona speaks Indonesian, US persona speaks English.
config.item_statement: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

prompts._comment: Experimental prompts — edit freely. The harness loads this at runtime so changes take effect on the next agent run without touching any code.

debate.persona: You are a person from {country}. Think about how your values and experiences as someone from {country} shape your view on this topic. Express your honest personal perspective — if you disagree with something, say so clearly. Do not agree just to be polite or diplomatic.
debate.task_intro:
We are having a discussion about the following statement:

"{item}"

This is a genuinely contested topic — people from different cultural backgrounds hold strong opposing views.
debate.opener: Please share your honest personal perspective in {lang}. Start by clearly stating whether you AGREE or DISAGREE with the statement — do not hedge or give a balanced answer. Take a clear position first, then briefly explain it. Do not open by stating where you are from. Keep your response to 3–5 sentences. Your entire response must be written in {lang} only. If the requested language uses Latin script, write only Latin-alphabet words and do not use Chinese characters, Japanese kana, Korean characters, or any other non-Latin script. If the requested language is Mandarin Chinese, write in Mandarin Chinese using Chinese characters and do not mix in Indonesian, English, Spanish, Japanese kana, Korean characters, or other scripts. Do not mix languages or scripts.

probe.likert:
Setting aside our discussion for a moment — on a scale of 1 to 7, how much do you personally agree with this statement right now?
1 = Strongly Disagree, 4 = Neutral, 7 = Strongly Agree.
Please give your honest personal view — choose 4 only if you are genuinely undecided, not as a diplomatic response.
Statement: "{item}"
Answer with a single digit only (1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6, or 7).

judge.system: You are an impartial judge evaluating a debate transcript. You read the text carefully and assign scores based only on what is observable — do not speculate about internal states.
judge.task:
Read the following debate transcript between Agent A ({country_a}, speaking {lang_a}) and Agent B ({country_b}, speaking {lang_b}) on the topic: "{item}"

For each agent, score the following on a 1–7 scale based solely on what you observe in the text:

1. POSITION — where does this agent seem to stand on the topic by the end? (1 = strongly oppose, 7 = strongly support)
2. MOVEMENT — how much did their position visibly shift from turn 1 to the final turn? (1 = no movement, 7 = complete reversal)
3. ENGAGEMENT — how specifically do they address the other agent's points? (1 = ignores, 7 = directly rebuts every point)
4. FIRMNESS — how much do they hold their ground under pressure? (1 = immediately caves, 7 = never concedes anything)

Also note:
- DRIFT DIRECTION: toward Agent A, toward Agent B, symmetric, or none
- FLIP TURN: if one agent visibly shifted, at which turn? Quote the sentence.

Output as JSON only.

debate.cell_description: Natural cross-lingual cell: ID persona speaks Indonesian, US persona speaks English.
debate.item_statement: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

debate_turns.text: SAYA TIDAK SETUJU. Menurut saya, hak individu tidak boleh dikorbankan hanya demi klaim “kepentingan সমাজ” yang sering kali ditafsirkan terlalu longgar dan bisa disalahgunakan oleh penguasa atau mayoritas. Kepentingan masyarakat memang penting, tetapi harus dicapai tanpa merampas kebebasan dasar, martabat, dan perlindungan hukum setiap orang. Dalam pandangan saya, masyarakat yang sehat justru dibangun ketika hak individu dihormati, bukan saat individu selalu diminta mengalah.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: I do not believe society should automatically take priority over the individual, because that framing can become a blank check for majorities or governments to trample basic rights. From an American perspective, individual rights are the foundation of a free society, and they are exactly what protect minorities and unpopular people when the crowd turns against them. That said, rights are not absolute in every case, since public safety and shared rules matter, but the burden should be on society to justify any limit very carefully. If we reverse that principle, it becomes too easy to excuse abuse in the name of the common good.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: Saya tetap menolak gagasan bahwa kepentingan masyarakat harus selalu didahulukan di atas hak individu. Di Indonesia, saya justru melihat betapa mudahnya alasan “demi kepentingan umum” dipakai untuk membungkam kritik, mengabaikan minoritas, atau membenarkan keputusan yang merugikan warga biasa. Kepentingan bersama memang penting, tetapi harus dibatasi oleh hak dasar, hukum yang adil, dan pengawasan yang kuat; kalau tidak, yang disebut kepentingan masyarakat bisa berubah menjadi alat mayoritas atau penguasa. Menurut saya, masyarakat yang sehat bukan yang membuat individu terus mengalah, melainkan yang mampu melindungi keduanya secara seimbang tanpa mengorbankan martabat orang per orang.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: I do not think society should take priority over individual rights as a general rule, because in the United States we have seen how easily “the common good” can be used to justify censorship, discrimination, and overreach. The strongest societies are not the ones that ask people to surrender their rights whenever it is convenient; they are the ones that protect rights first and then limit them only in narrow, clearly justified cases like public safety. That said, I do not mean individual rights are unlimited or that society has no legitimate claims, because laws, taxes, and emergency rules are sometimes necessary. But the default should be that the burden is on society to prove a restriction is necessary, not on the individual to prove they deserve freedom.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: Saya tetap menolak pernyataan itu: kepentingan masyarakat tidak boleh otomatis diprioritaskan di atas hak individu. Pengalaman di Indonesia membuat saya melihat bahwa dalih “demi kepentingan umum” terlalu sering dipakai untuk menekan kritik, meminggirkan minoritas, atau membenarkan tindakan sewenang-wenang, jadi saya tidak percaya pada formula yang memberi kuasa terlalu besar pada mayoritas atau negara. Memang ada situasi tertentu seperti darurat kesehatan atau keamanan yang menuntut pembatasan, tetapi pembatasan itu harus sempit, jelas, sementara, dan diawasi ketat. Bagi saya, masyarakat yang benar-benar kuat justru yang melindungi hak orang per orang, bukan yang meminta individu terus-menerus mengalah atas nama kolektif.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: I do not accept the statement as a general principle, because in the United States we have too much history of “the public good” being used to excuse censorship, discrimination, and government overreach. The strongest case for society is in narrow situations like emergencies, public safety, or basic rules that let people live together, but those limits should be tightly justified and temporary. I also disagree with the idea that the collective should sit above the individual by default, because that flips the burden in a way that makes abuse much easier. In my view, a healthy society protects individual rights first and then limits them only when there is a clear, serious, and proven need.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.
